<!-- GENERATED by `bun run gen` from scenarios/mysql/03-locking/nowait.yaml — do not edit by hand. -->

```transcript
A> BEGIN;
Query OK

A> SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE id = 1 FOR UPDATE;
 id 
----
  1 
(1 row)

B> SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE id = 1 FOR UPDATE NOWAIT; -- ER_LOCK_NOWAIT — instantly, no waiting
ERROR 3572 (HY000): Statement aborted because lock(s) could not be acquired immediately and NOWAIT is set.
```

*Once A is done, the same statement succeeds.*

```transcript
A> COMMIT;
Query OK

B> SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE id = 1 FOR UPDATE NOWAIT;
 id 
----
  1 
(1 row)
```

<small>Verified against MySQL 8.4.10 · [Run it yourself](/about/run-locally) · [Scenario source](https://github.com/svyatov/database-transactions/blob/main/scenarios/mysql/03-locking/nowait.yaml)</small>
